results.title: Surflo: Consistent 3D Surface Flow Model with Global State
results.content:
We presented Surflo, a feed-forward 3D reconstruction model that compresses an arbitrary number of unposed RGB views into a single fixed-size latent, and decodes an arbitrary number of oriented surface points from that latent through flow matching in ℝ3×𝕊2{\mathds{R}}^{3}\times\mathbb{S}^{2}. Per-point independence in the decoder makes the model both flexible and scalable: the same shared latent supports a coarse global preview as well as million-point dense surfaces. To compensate for the lack of explicit surface coupling between independent points, we proposed a photometric guidance scheme that injects the gradient of a differentiable rendering loss into the ODE, correlating nearby points and aligning the output with the input images. As an auxiliary contribution, we built and will [...] Varying number of input views.
Beyond the 1616-view protocol used on all datasets above, we further study how Surflo behaves as the number of input views changes. Because the encoder compresses any number of views into a fixed-size latent, the same model can be evaluated across capture densities without retraining or any architectural change.
Tables 3 and 4 report this experiment on two out-of-distribution datasets, Tanks & Temples and Mip-NeRF 360, as the number of unposed input views per scene varies from 22 to 3232.
Surflo is consistently best across all view counts, including the very sparse 22-view regime. While Surflo benefits from additional views, the size of the latent does not grow with the number of views. [...] Multi-resolution decoding.
A key feature of Surflo is that the latent itself does not change with the requested output resolution. Figure 5 shows the same scene latent decoded at three resolutions, from 88K to 128128K points, on the same GPU. The coarse output is suitable for fast collision queries or scene previews, while the dense output offers sharper details and background geometry.

Terumo Surflo IV Catheters

# Terumo Surflo IV Catheters

REF: SROX2419CA, SROX2225CA, SROX2032CA, SROX2025CA, SROX1832CA

SKU: Categories: Supplies, IV Administration

 Size:
 Quantity: 1

Terumo Surflo™ IV Catheters – Reliable Peripheral Intravenous Access

Description:  
Terumo Surflo™ IV Catheters are high-quality, peripheral intravenous catheters designed for safe and efficient venous access in a variety of clinical settings. Known for their smooth insertion and reliable performance, Surflo catheters help facilitate the administration of fluids, medications, and blood products with minimal patient discomfort.

Key Features: [...] Sizes & Packaging:

 Available in gauges ranging typically from 14G to 24G
 Offered in sterile, single-use packs
 Packaging options vary from individual units to bulk boxes to suit clinical demands

Usage & Handling:  
Designed for ease of insertion by healthcare professionals trained in IV catheterization. The catheter’s flexibility and smooth surface minimize insertion discomfort and reduce the risk of phlebitis.

Warnings and Precautions:

 Single-use device; do not reuse or resterilize
 Follow standard aseptic techniques during insertion
 Inspect packaging integrity prior to use
 Discard if sterile barrier is compromised

Regulatory Status:  
Class II medical device; complies with relevant ISO standards for intravenous catheters.

Product specifications

SKU:
:   SROX-main [...] Key Features:

 Made from biocompatible polyurethane or Teflon, providing flexibility and durability
 Available in multiple gauges and lengths to suit pediatric and adult patients
 Radiopaque design allows for easy visualization under imaging
 Integrated needle safety features reduce risk of needlestick injuries
 Smooth catheter tip reduces venous trauma and enhances patient comfort
 Transparent catheter hub for easy visualization of blood flashback
 Compatible with standard IV administration sets and connectors

Clinical Applications:  
Ideal for peripheral venous cannulation for:

 Intravenous fluid therapy
 Medication administration
 Blood transfusions
 Blood sampling

Sizes & Packaging:

results.title: SUR-VET® SURFLO® ETFE I.V. Catheters
results.content:
# Sur-Vet® Surflo® ETFE Veterinary IV Catheters

The SUR-VET SURFLO ETFE IV catheter is the IV catheter veterinary professionals prefer for dogs, cats and other pets. Bred for performance, its ultra-sharp, double-bevel introducer needle and medical-grade lubricant means easier penetration and smoother travel through tissue. The clear, sure-grip hub features a preview chamber to indicate proper placement, while the large inner diameter of the catheter assures good blood flow.

So, when you need an IV catheter for dogs, cats or other pets, the SUR-VET SURFLO ETFE IV catheter is second to none. Choose from a variety of veterinary IV catheter sizes.

See the table below for more information.

## Products

### Industry Flows Through Us

### Flow Monitors

### Meters

### Control Valve

Sur-Flo Meters & Controls manufactures and supplies flow measurement and pressure control equipment for industrial operations across Alberta, British Columbia, Saskatchewan, the United States, and Mexico. Products are built and stocked at our Calgary, Alberta facility for high-debris, high-corrosion, and demanding process service where conventional instrumentation falls short. [...] Sur-Flo Meters & Controls serves oil and gas, mining, municipal water, chemical processing, and pulp and paper operations across Western Canada and the United States. Our manufacturing capabilities and supplier network mean there are virtually no limitations to finding the right solution for your application.

SF1015 Paddle Meter Canadian-manufactured in Calgary, Alberta. Customizable size, end connections, and material of construction. No upstream or downstream straight-run requirements. Three-step field service by plant maintenance personnel. Built for produced water, slurry, abrasive fluids, and high-debris liquid service. [...] SF10V Control Valve Canadian-manufactured in Calgary, Alberta. Built for backpressure control, liner protection, flow control, and pressure reduction in oil and gas, mining, chemical processing, and water management. Only three internal parts. Handles high-debris liquids, gas, oil, and mixed-phase service without venting fumes to the atmosphere.

Clamp-On Ultrasonic Meter Non-intrusive flow measurement with no pipe modification or process shutdown required. Clamps onto existing pipe. Compatible with almost every piping system and material. One percent measurement uncertainty in liquid applications free of gas or air bubbles.

results.content:
## Canadian-Made Industrial Flow Measurement Solutions

Sur-Flo manufactures paddle meters, control valves, and additional instrumentation for applications requiring dependable flow monitoring and long-term serviceability across North America. 

Our instrumentation is used in process systems where measurement accuracy, maintenance accessibility, and operational continuity directly impact production performance.

Case Studies

## Robust Solutions for Severe-Duty Process Applications

Sur-Flo products are engineered for process environments involving debris, scaling, abrasive materials, corrosive fluids, and high-wear operating conditions where conventional equipment may plug, deteriorate, or require frequent service intervals. [...] Skip to content

Office: 403-207-9715 Fax: 403-207-9440

 

## INDUSTRY FLOWS THROUGH US

## Industrial Flow Measurement and Pressure Control Solutions | Sur-Flo Meters & Controls

Sur-Flo Meters & Controls builds Canadian-made flow meters, control valves, and flow monitoring equipment for high-debris and high-corrosion industrial applications. Manufactured in Calgary, Alberta, our products are designed to reduce maintenance, minimise downtime, and support reliable long-term operation in oil and gas, mining, municipal water, and other demanding process industries.

Explore Our Products

## Canadian-Made Industrial Flow Measurement Solutions [...] Our simple, durable designs support oil and gas producers, water utilities, mining operations, and industrial processors maintain process uptime while reducing service frequency in difficult operating environments. You get reliable measurement accuracy and pressure control performance without the need for constant maintenance.

Contact Our Team

## Less Downtime. Less Maintenance. Better Flow Measurement.

Contact our team to discuss process requirements, operating conditions, or specific flow measurement and pressure control applications.
